{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113455510C502C3DDA29F0A9FCD"}"},"total":164},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7507375337921463064","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"多尔衮是个悲情人物，有帝王之志没有帝王之命，有两次近在咫尺离皇位仅一步之遥确到死都没能坐上，明明是清朝入主中原第一大功臣死后竟被清算刨坟鞭尸，挫骨扬灰，家庭情况也是悲惨少年时期母亲因为权力之争被处死，一起相依唯命的弟弟又英年早逝，只有一个女儿活了下来连一个儿子都没有家族算是绝嗣了，希望在这里能改变他凄惨的命运"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747960775,"group_id":"7501934211096398873","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3285798800601160"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7501934211096398873","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4682,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7507174352840983320","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"战争场面写的很详细真实精彩"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747902235,"group_id":"7501934211096398873","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N57CxEy9Mko66KVKrAhRZqvLzWSTCb2WLpJ7f07w4AQz","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3285798800601160","user_name":"北凉的白绝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3285798800601160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"is_book_forum_operator","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d5c4e7be80ba156a2703698120ff4e4","icon_width":64,"icon_height":23}","intro":"{"title_name":"运营官","title_detail":"《穿越清初多尔衮开局迎娶大玉儿》的书圈运营官是一个珍贵的头衔，授予兼具创作力与责任心的书友，肩负活跃书圈的使命！","title_id":"is_book_forum_operator","big_icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0151264e36a6375ece6f9471ed95de86","detail_url":"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#5BA1E1"}","zh_title":"运营官"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7501934211096398873","book_info":{"abstract":"（清初+无系统+解开了明末清初的那段历史）
历史迷张霖意外穿越成清朝传奇摄政王多尔衮，手握改写历史的机会。
他发誓不再重蹈原主覆辙，誓要扭转多尔衮爱而不得、死后被挫骨扬灰的悲剧命运。
这一世，他不仅要征服草原明珠大玉儿（布木布泰），更要问鼎天下，改写大清与明朝的格局！
从科尔沁草原的惊艳亮相，到那达慕大会勇夺三冠王；从敖包定情血誓，到盛京权力漩涡中的隐忍布局；从朝鲜战场的铁血征伐，到与皇太极的暗中博弈——多尔衮凭借现代智慧与历史先知，步步为营，誓要成为真正的天下之主！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o49731dd2ce2ca1fa7fdb42d65dc0bf71~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"牛奶布丁基本可乐","author_id":"","book_id":"7501934211096398873","book_name":"穿越清初多尔衮开局迎娶大玉儿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7502018708152271385","read_count":"847","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"236530"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"95","tags":"历史古代,清朝,历史,多女主,皇帝,同人,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o49731dd2ce2ca1fa7fdb42d65dc0bf71~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255955&x-signature=5pJ9xUZ2Lwdt08l0yXkdbI8STc4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"339108537045598","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info
